native: 爱与何断断 百年孤为难
roman: ai yu he duan duan bai nian gu wei nan
en: Love and what breaks apart, a century of loneliness is difficult
zh: 爱与何断断 百年孤为难
ja: 愛と何が断ち切れるのか、百年の孤独は難しい
local: 爱与何断断 百年孤为难
local_pron: ai yu he duan duan bai nian gu wei nan
zh_pron: ai yu he duan duan bai nian gu wei nan
pinyin: ai yu he duan duan bai nian gu wei nan

native: 藏住好冒冒 万劫太机场
roman: cang zhu hao mao mao wan jie tai ji chang
en: Hiding well, countless calamities at the airport
zh: 藏住好冒冒 万劫太机场
ja: よく隠している、無数の災難が空港にある
local: 藏住好冒冒 万劫太机场
local_pron: cang zhu hao mao mao wan jie tai ji chang
zh_pron: cang zhu hao mao mao wan jie tai ji chang
pinyin: cang zhu hao mao mao wan jie tai ji chang

native: 卖无垂凉鱼 一般一盏双
roman: mai wu chui liang yu yi ban yi zhan shuang
en: Selling unsold cold fish, usually one pair of lamps
zh: 卖无垂凉鱼 一般一盏双
ja: 売れ残った冷たい魚、普通は一対の灯り
local: 卖无垂凉鱼 一般一盏双
local_pron: mai wu chui liang yu yi ban yi zhan shuang
zh_pron: mai wu chui liang yu yi ban yi zhan shuang
pinyin: mai wu chui liang yu yi ban yi zhan shuang

native: 天空间一缕 大笑一千种
roman: tian kong jian yi lu da xiao yi qian zhong
en: A ray in the sky, a thousand kinds of laughter
zh: 天空间一缕 大笑一千种
ja: 空の中の一筋の光、千の笑い
local: 天空间一缕 大笑一千种
local_pron: tian kong jian yi lu da xiao yi qian zhong
zh_pron: tian kong jian yi lu da xiao yi qian zhong
pinyin: tian kong jian yi lu da xiao yi qian zhong

native: 无欲难流浪回这关藏
roman: wu yu nan liu lang hui zhe guan cang
en: Without desire, it is hard to wander back to this checkpoint
zh: 无欲难流浪回这关藏
ja: 欲望がなければ、この関所に戻るのは難しい
local: 无欲难流浪回这关藏
local_pron: wu yu nan liu lang hui zhe guan cang
zh_pron: wu yu nan liu lang hui zhe guan cang

native: 被影响着 美酒却弄个衣裳
roman: bei ying xiang zhe mei jiu que nong ge yi shang
en: Being influenced, fine wine yet making a garment
zh: 被影响着 美酒却弄个衣裳
ja: 影響を受けて、美酒が衣服を作る
local: 被影响着 美酒却弄个衣裳
local_pron: bei ying xiang zhe mei jiu que nong ge yi shang
zh_pron: bei ying xiang zhe mei jiu que nong ge yi shang

native: 富贵非所愿 异人朱颜光
roman: fu gui fei suo yuan yi ren zhu yan guang
en: Wealth and honor are not desired, a stranger's rosy face shines
